# Model Performance Comparison Table

The following table may not reflect the models used.  This is a template, use whatever is necessary for the models used.

| Model               | Accuracy | Precision | Recall | F1-Score | AUC-ROC |
|--------------------|----------|-----------|--------|----------|---------|
| Logistic Regression| [xx%]    | [xx%]     | [xx%]  | [xx%]    | [0.xx]  |
| Decision Tree      | [xx%]    | [xx%]     | [xx%]  | [xx%]    | [0.xx]  |
| Random Forest      | [xx%]    | [xx%]     | [xx%]  | [xx%]    | [0.xx]  |
| XGBoost            | [xx%]    | [xx%]     | [xx%]  | [xx%]    | [0.xx]  |
| **Best Model ✓**   | **[xx%]**| **[xx%]** | **[xx%]** | **[xx%]** | **[0.xx]** |
